description: MediaAlpha operates a marketplace and software platform for insurance customer acquisition and monetization, connecting carriers, publishers, apps, and agents. Its products include reporting/analytics capabilities and embedded or direct-to-quote insurance shopping experiences.
summary: MediaAlpha publicly exposes a public MCP server for Autoinsurance.net and references two partner-facing HTTP API offerings: a Reporting API and an Embedded Quote/Direct-to-Quote API suite; no public OpenAPI, GraphQL, CLI, or authentication docs were found.

surfaces.name: MediaAlpha Embedded Quote / Direct-to-Quote API Suite
